title: viola pulchella
intro: Viola pulchella, also known as the small purple violet, is a perennial plant species native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viola pulchella include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Viola pulchella can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat wounds and skin irritations.
